title: The Unwitting Witness
description: Two wrong publications sit on the board — one about Fern, one about Scorpion. A careful mix is worth more than two apprentice reveals.

hints.text: Two publications need to go: ing1 claims pNn, and ing6 claims nPp. Use a definitively known ingredient as your witness to challenge each one in turn. ing4 is fully established by the clues and has no publication of its own.

Mix ing4 + ing1. True result: G+.
The publication claims ing1 is pNn. Predicted mix(nPp + pNn) = neutral ≠ G+, conflict is unambiguous → ing1's publication removed.

Now mix ing4 + ing6. True result: G+.
The publication claims ing6 is nPp. Predicted mix(nPp + nPp) = neutral ≠ G+, conflict is unambiguous → ing6's publication removed.

Step 1: Master — mix ing4 + ing1 → true G+. Claimed pNn for ing1: mix(nPp, pNn) = neutral ≠ G+ → ing1's publication removed.
Step 2: Master — mix ing4 + ing6 → true G+. Claimed nPp for ing6: mix(nPp, nPp) = neutral ≠ G+ → ing6's publication removed.
